title: The Evangelion Kubrick Series
wikitext:
[]: The Evangelion Kubrick Series             Quote Post by ianthegamer » Wed Aug 10, 2016 10:48 am Has that ended? I havent seen any news on 3.0 Kubrick. I have all the original sets, the rebuild sets and am hoping it continues. Has anyone found news on this? Seems they have moved the franchise to bearbricks and are no longer doing kubricks but I really hope it shifts back. Not a fan of the Medicom Bearbricks

[]: Re: The Evangelion Kubrick Series             Quote Post by ianthegamer » Tue Oct 11, 2016 11:24 am Figured Id update with my most recent Evangelion kubricks on display. The older ones from the NGE series are all still boxed displayed elsewhere
